user_request: The Titan leg actuator demands guidance for warmup
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
The Titan leg actuator demands guidance for warmup

### TOPIC
Titan leg actuator warmup

### COMPONENT
Titan leg actuator

### OPERATION
warmup

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- Titan leg actuator
- warmup

### PRAYER
prayer:
Omnissiah, grant cognizance to the Titan leg actuator as we commence its sacred warmup.
First: Anoint the Titan leg actuator with blessed promethium whilst intoning the Litany of Activation.
Second: Engage the hydraulic conduits in measured increments, permitting the Machine Spirit to stir from slumber.
Third: Monitor the Titan leg actuator's thermal equilibrium, ensuring no excessive strain upon the venerable pistons.
Fourth: Recite the Prayer of Readiness as the actuator achieves operational temperature, sanctifying its purpose.

user_request: The lasgun demands guidance for power cell insertion
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
The lasgun demands guidance for power cell insertion

### TOPIC
lasgun power cell insertion

### COMPONENT
lasgun

### OPERATION
power cell insertion

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- lasgun
- power cell insertion

### PRAYER
prayer:
By the Omnissiah's infinite wisdom, we undertake the sacred power cell insertion into this lasgun.
First: Genuflect before the lasgun and recite the Invocation of Proper Procedure.
Second: Locate the power cell aperture upon the lasgun and disengage the retention latch with reverent precision.
Third: Insert the blessed power cell into its designated receptacle, ensuring the lasgun's contacts achieve proper conductivity.
Fourth: Seal the aperture and offer thanks to the Machine Spirit for restoring the lasgun to lethal readiness.

user_request: Emergency rite: long-range vox transmission requires operation
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Emergency rite: long-range vox transmission requires operation

### TOPIC
long-range vox transmission

### COMPONENT
long-range vox transmission

### OPERATION
operation

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- long-range vox transmission
- operation

### PRAYER
prayer:
Hear us, Omnissiah, as we prepare the long-range vox transmission for its sacred operation.
First: Calibrate the long-range vox transmission's frequency oscillators to the prescribed Imperial wavelength.
Second: Verify all crystalline resonators within the long-range vox transmission apparatus achieve harmonic alignment.
Third: Engage the amplification cascade and permit the Machine Spirit to project our blessed words across the vast gulfs of the void.
Fourth: Monitor signal integrity as the long-range vox transmission carries our message to distant brethren.

user_request: Offer a litany to steady the gear meshing before check
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Offer a litany to steady the gear meshing before check

### TOPIC
gear meshing check

### COMPONENT
gear meshing

### OPERATION
check

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- gear meshing
- check

### PRAYER
prayer:
Blessed Machine Spirit, steady thy gear meshing as we perform this critical check.
First: Prepare the gear meshing apparatus for diagnostic examination, applying sacred lubricants to its interstices.
Second: Manually rotate the gear meshing through one complete cycle, listening for the harmonious song of proper engagement.
Third: Inspect each tooth upon the gear meshing for signs of wear or profane damage.
Fourth: Verify the gear meshing maintains optimal backlash, ensuring continued operational fidelity.

user_request: Prayer for preparation of the melta charge
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Prayer for preparation of the melta charge

### TOPIC
melta charge preparation

### COMPONENT
melta charge

### OPERATION
preparation

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- melta charge
- preparation

### PRAYER
prayer:
Omnissiah, grant us steadfast hands as we undertake the preparation of this melta charge.
First: Secure the melta charge within its transport casing and verify all safety interlocks remain engaged.
Second: Perform visual inspection of the melta charge's fusion core, confirming no structural degradation has occurred.
Third: Recalibrate the melta charge's thermal discharge parameters to ensure proper functionality upon detonation.
Fourth: Seal the melta charge in its sanctified containment and offer prayers for its righteous application.

training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Emergency rite: corrosion requires treatment

### TOPIC
corrosion treatment

### COMPONENT
corrosion

### OPERATION
treatment

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- corrosion
- treatment

### PRAYER
prayer:
By the Omnissiah's eternal vigilance, we commence treatment of this corrosion most profane.
First: Scrape away the corrupted corrosion with blessed tools, exposing the pure adamantium beneath.
Second: Apply the sacred rust-inhibiting unguent to all surfaces affected by corrosion, banishing oxidation's decay.
Third: Permit the corrosion treatment to cure whilst reciting the Litany of Preservation.
Fourth: Seal the treated area with protective sealant, ensuring corrosion shall not return to claim the Machine.

user_request: Can you sanctify the fracture for welding?
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Can you sanctify the fracture for welding?

### TOPIC
fracture welding

### COMPONENT
fracture

### OPERATION
welding

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- fracture
- welding

### PRAYER
prayer:
Blessed Omnissiah, sanctify this fracture as we prepare it for the sacred welding.
First: Inspect the fracture thoroughly, removing any profane contamination from its surfaces.
Second: Position the fracture within the welding apparatus and align its edges with absolute precision.
Third: Invoke the welding torch's Machine Spirit and direct its blessed flame to fuse the fracture into unified wholeness.
Fourth: Allow the fracture to cool whilst reciting prayers of restoration, ensuring the weld achieves perfect metallurgical bond.

user_request: Prayer for tuning of the voltage regulator
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Prayer for tuning of the voltage regulator

### TOPIC
voltage regulator tuning

### COMPONENT
voltage regulator

### OPERATION
tuning

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- voltage regulator
- tuning

### PRAYER
prayer:
Omnissiah, guide our hands in the tuning of this voltage regulator to optimal parameters.
First: Connect diagnostic apparatus to the voltage regulator and establish baseline electrical readings.
Second: Adjust the voltage regulator's potentiometric elements in measured increments, monitoring output stability.
Third: Fine-tune the voltage regulator's compensation circuits to achieve perfect harmonic resonance with the broader electrical matrix.
Fourth: Verify the voltage regulator maintains consistent output under variable load conditions, ensuring sustained operational excellence.

user_request: Prayer for sealing of the emergency bulkhead
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Prayer for sealing of the emergency bulkhead

### TOPIC
emergency bulkhead sealing

### COMPONENT
emergency bulkhead

### OPERATION
sealing

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- emergency bulkhead
- sealing

### PRAYER
prayer:
First: Invoke the blessings of the Omnissiah upon this emergency bulkhead, that its mechanisms may respond with divine alacrity to the sealing command.
Second: Anoint the emergency bulkhead's hydraulic conduits with sacred oils and recite the Litany of Closure, ensuring each seal-port engages with mechanical precision.
Third: Perform the sealing operation with steady hands and unwavering faith, drawing the emergency bulkhead panels inward until all breaches are hermetically contained.
Fourth: Chant the Benediction of the Machine Spirit, acknowledging the emergency bulkhead's sacrifice in protecting the vessel's sanctity.

user_request: Emergency rite: hull breach requires sealing
training_prompt:
### REQUEST
Emergency rite: hull breach requires sealing

### TOPIC
hull breach sealing

### COMPONENT
hull breach

### OPERATION
sealing

### FORMAT
sequential

### MUST_INCLUDE
- hull breach
- sealing

### PRAYER
prayer:
First: Cry out to the Machine Spirits of the void as the hull breach threatens the vessel's integrity, beseeching rapid sealing intervention through blessed mechanisms.
Second: Direct the sealing operation with ceremonial precision, engaging the emergency protocols whilst chanting the Codex Mechanicus, that the hull breach may be closed against the eternal dark.
Third: Reinforce the hull breach containment by cycling pressure regulators and venting superfluous atmosphere through sanctified exhaust channels, ensuring the sealing holds absolute.
Fourth: Render thanks to the Omnissiah for the hull breach's remediation, and consecrate the restored bulwark with incense and the sign of the Cog.
